toolCall.argumentsJson: {"CommandLine":"powershell -Command \"Expand-Archive -Path 'Word meaning prompt list.docx' -DestinationPath 'temp_word' -Force; Select-String -Path 'temp_word\\word\\document.xml' -Pattern '(?\u003c=\u003cw:t.*?\u003e)(.*?)(?=\u003c/w:t\u003e)' -AllMatches | % { $_.Matches } | % { $_.Value } | Out-File 'word_meaning_prompt_list.txt' -Encoding utf8\"","Cwd":"D:\\English Vidya\\Archive\\SourceFiles","WaitMsBeforeAsync":2000,"toolAction":"Extracting docx to text","toolSummary":"Extract docx text"}
